question: I am studying for my exams. [ studying这个词]
They are playing basketball.[ playing这个词]
Singing in the shower is joyful.[ Singing 这个词]
We are watching a movie together at home right now.[watching这个词 ]
Dancing under stars is magical.[ Dancing这个词]
Running in the park is my morning activity.[Running这个词 ]
The kids are laughing in the backyard.[laughing这个词 ]
